record.field: val = o.z_fe_encab.z_value_base * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else o.z_fe_encab.z_value_base
val = o.z_fe_encab.z_value_total * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else o.z_fe_encab.z_value_total
val = o.z_fe_encab.z_value_total * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else o.z_fe_encab.z_value_total
val = for_item[index_i].z_value_tax * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else for_item[index_i].z_value_tax
val = for_item[index_i].z_value_base * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else for_item[index_i].z_value_base
val = for_item[index_i].z_value_tax * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else for_item[index_i].z_value_tax
val = str(o.invoice_date) if o.invoice_payment_term_id.name == 'Pago inmediato' else str(o.invoice_date_due)
val = o.description_code_credit if o.move_type == 'out_refund' else o.description_code_debit
val = for_item[index_i].z_value_base * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else for_item[index_i].z_value_base

val = (for_item[index_i].z_value_base / for_item[index_i].z_quantity) * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else (for_item[index_i].z_value_base / for_item[index_i].z_quantity)
val = for_item[index_i].z_value_base * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else for_item[index_i].z_value_base
val = for_item[index_i].z_value_base * o.z_fe_encab.z_exchange_rate if o.currency_id.name != 'COP' else for_item[index_i].z_value_base
